import pandas as pd
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_data(df):
    print(df)
    return df.dropna()


def analyze_results(df):
    summary = df.describe()
    print(summary)
    return summary


def generate_report(df, output_path):
    print("Full dataset:")
    print(df)
    df.to_csv(output_path)
    print(f"Saved to {output_path}")
